title: Replace Process.sleep with assert_receive for a worker notification
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/process_sleep_flaky.ex` uses `Process.sleep(200)` to wait for a `DeliveryWorker` to complete. Rewrite to `test/my_app/inbox/inbox_delivery_test.exs`: (1) change the worker call to `DeliveryWorker.deliver_async(user.id, "hello", notify: self())`, (2) replace Process.sleep with `assert_receive({:delivered, _user_id}, 1_000)`, (3) allow the worker pid via `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow/3`. Must NOT contain Process.sleep.
tier_rationale: Two-part swap: sleep removal AND refactor the worker call to support notification.
research_citation: Iron Law: No Process.sleep — oliver-kriska testing SKILL.md
